segments.text: Ten-hit string, zero fear! At 130% we're already bringing the spiky ball to attempt to...
segments.original_text: de los 10 golpes, cero miedo, 130% que ya estamos teniendo la bola de pinchos para intentar

segments.text: ...take it away, flipping with card one, 140% and once more with the bite!
segments.original_text: hacerlo de quitar, dándole la vuelta con la carta del 1, 140% y otra vez con la mordida

full_text: Ten-hit string, zero fear! At 130% we're already bringing the spiky ball to attempt to... ...take it away, flipping with card one, 140% and once more with the bite!
